description_long: This is a modern bathroom or washroom sink unit featuring a rectangular wooden vanity with a white ceramic vessel basin on top. The vanity has a series of horizontal drawer or panel lines on the front, suggesting storage compartments, and is finished in a warm wood tone. Above the sink is a large, round mirror, and to the side is a small, wall-mounted rectangular soap dish or shelf. The vessel basin is square with gently sloped sides and a flat bottom, and it sits fully above the countertop. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. No faucet is visible, and the drain appears to be located at the rear of the basin.
description: A modern wooden vanity with a white vessel sink, round mirror, and wall-mounted soap dish, featuring clean lines and a minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full vanity, vessel sink, round mirror, and wall-mounted soap dish, with visible drawer lines.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the vanity, the vessel sink's profile, and the thickness of the mirror and soap dish.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open back of the vanity, the underside of the vessel sink, and the mirror and soap dish from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the vessel sink's profile and the mirror's edge, with the soap dish visible on the wall.
